# sci_group_assignments (Data Source)

Gets all member assignments for a group from the SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read a grou's' assignments by group ID
data "sci_group_assignments" "by_id" {
  group_id = "group_1234567890" # Must be a valid UUID
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) Unique ID of the group.

### Read-Only

- `values` (Attributes List) List of members assigned to the group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values))

<a id="nestedatt--values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values`

Read-Only:

- `type` (String) Type of the member.
- `value` (String) SCIM ID of the user or group assigned.
